results.title: Ellis — AI Notes for In-Person Meetings | Launly
results.content:
## AI Analysis

Ellis is an AI notetaker for in-person meetings that records audio using only an iPhone or Apple Watch. It delivers clean transcripts with speaker identification and enables natural language queries about decisions, missed details, or meeting sentiment. It solves key pain points like distraction from manual note-taking, incomplete records, and post-meeting transcription effort. The value proposition is effortless, hardware-free capture and intelligent insights for face-to-face conversations, boosting productivity while keeping meetings natural. [...] Ellis

# Ellis

AI Notes for In-Person Meetings

Ellis screenshot 1
Ellis thumbnail 1
Ellis thumbnail 2
Ellis thumbnail 3
Ellis thumbnail 4
Ellis thumbnail 5

Ellis is an AI notetaker for in-person meetings. Record your meeting, get a clean transcript with each speaker identified, then ask anything — what was decided, what you missed, how it went. No laptop. No extra hardware. Just your iPhone (or Apple Watch).

## AI Analysis [...] Medium. Direct competitors: 1. Otter.ai (otter.ai), 2. Fireflies.ai (fireflies.ai), 3. Limitless (limitless.ai), 4. Mem (mem.ai), 5. Notta (notta.ai). Ellis advantages: pure in-person focus with zero extra hardware, seamless iPhone/Apple Watch experience, and conversational querying. Disadvantages: Apple-only ecosystem limits reach, faces accuracy challenges vs established players with more training data, and lacks some virtual meeting integrations competitors offer.

results.title: ‎Ellis – In-Person AI Notes App - App Store
results.content:
Ellis is an AI notetaker for in-person meetings, not over Zoom. Built for people, where being in the same room matters. Perfect for conferences, coffee meetups, therapy sessions, face-to-face sales meetings, interviews, or on-site research sessions. Stay present, and capture your interactions all in one tap. Ellis automatically transcribes your meeting, helps you tag your own voice as speaker, and writes elegant notes you can share: simple summaries, or one focused on outcomes, process, or how you came across. In-person meetings are worth keeping. They're more honest than a screen, and they go deeper. Ellis is built to learn from them. SINLGE-TAP CAPTURE - Use Lock Screen or Home Screen widgets for faster access - Pause / resume / complete – just like your favorite fitness activity app [...] / complete – just like your favorite fitness activity app ASK ELLIS - Ask anything about a specific meeting - Ask about your personal progress between multiple meetings - Get insights on decisions made, who spoke how much, and what you can do differently next time as a speaker - Ask for information based on where it was recorded, e.g. "what did the recruiter in Brooklyn say about leadership?" HOW IT WORKS - Start a new meeting recording from the Lock Screen or Home Page widget, or in the app - The recording is deleted once its transcribed - Tag your own voice by tapping a quote - Share notes or keep them private - Chat with your notes per recording, or ask general questions beyond a single meeting. - Type or talk to Ellis Try Ellis for your next in-person meetings today. It's free to get [...] # Ellis – In-Person AI Notes

results.title: The ELLIS Network
results.content:
ELLIS focuses on the machine learning discipline within Artificial Intelligence, which is the area behind the great advances in modern AI. The ELLIS strategy is based on three pillars to reinforce the technological excellence and sovereignty of Europe in this field of such competitive value:

Attracting, inspiring, cultivating and connecting the best doctoral students in Europe through a pan-European doctoral program that has €12 million in European funding through the ELISE programme.

Connecting the best European researchers through ELLIS research programs, made up of Fellows and Scholars, and dedicated to diverse topics, from basic research in theory and algorithms to applications of AI in health and life sciences climate and humanistic aspects of AI. [...] # The ELLIS Network

The ELLIS Network's focus is fundamental research excellence in AI in Europe, advancing the state of the art, generating technological innovation and creating positive social and economic impact.

ELLIS was created in 2018 as a result of a movement of the European scientific and research community in Artificial Intelligence, with the aim of placing our continent on the forefront of excellent research in artificial intelligence.

ELLIS Units [...] ELLIS Units

ELLIS' focus is fundamental research excellence, advancing the state of the art, generating technological innovation and creating positive social and economic impact. Its creation is part of the need to turn Europe into a pioneering region in AI research, since the world leadership in research, innovation and deployment/use of Artificial Intelligence is found in North America and China. Europe cannot afford not to have technological sovereignty in a discipline as strategic as Artificial Intelligence.

results.title: ELLIS - European Laboratory for Learning and Intelligent Systems - Strengthening Europe's Leadership in AI through Research Excellence
results.content:
## Overview
The European Laboratory for Learning and Intelligent Systems (ELLIS) is a pan-European AI network of excellence. It builds upon machine learning as the driver for modern AI and aims to secure lasting international leadership of AI made in Europe by connecting top researchers in this field and by creating a multi-centric AI research laboratory. Founded in 2018, ELLIS has grown into a network that counts 44 ELLIS units, 1 associate unit and 2 institutes at world-class institutions in 19 countries, 16 ELLIS research programs and a pan-European PhD program. The members of ELLIS are committed to shaping the future of AI in Europe by pushing the scientific and technological boundaries for human-centered, beneficial and safe AI.
